texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: The Kilimanjaro Balloon Safari Experience
texts.text: The Kilimanjaro Balloon Safari Experience

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Since  1783,  Hot  Air  Balloons  have  provided  onlookers  with  dreams, imagination, and experiences. In modern Hot Air Ballooning, Kenya was the original location for the first commercial passengers to fly in a Hot Air Balloon, anywhere in the World! Thirty-five years ago, our parent company first took flight in Toronto, Canada operating a single balloon.
texts.text: Since  1783,  Hot  Air  Balloons  have  provided  onlookers  with  dreams, imagination, and experiences. In modern Hot Air Ballooning, Kenya was the original location for the first commercial passengers to fly in a Hot Air Balloon, anywhere in the World! Thirty-five years ago, our parent company first took flight in Toronto, Canada operating a single balloon.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Fast forward to today and we are one of the largest, most experienced Hot  Air  Balloon  companies,  the  world  over.  With  an  extensive background in Operations, Maintenance, Manufacturing, Training and Corporate relationships, the Team at Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris (KBS) is committed to you and your clients.
texts.text: Fast forward to today and we are one of the largest, most experienced Hot  Air  Balloon  companies,  the  world  over.  With  an  extensive background in Operations, Maintenance, Manufacturing, Training and Corporate relationships, the Team at Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris (KBS) is committed to you and your clients.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: KBS operates 365 days a year, weather permitting, in the foothills of Mt.  Kilimanjaro  and  the  area  bordering  the  Amboseli  National  Park. With a custom planned and constructed Balloon Safari Camp, we are completely self-sufficient, and your guests are assured of a high-quality first-class experience. From the sunrise to the East, the magnificent Mt. Kilimanjaro to the south, the Amboseli National Park immediately to our north, your guests will see a full array of game including the areas renowned elephants, lions, giraffe, cheetah, zebra, wildebeest, eland, waterbuck, jackals, warthogs, fox and more than 400 species of birds in the immediate area, depending on the day. As Mother Nature dictates where we fly daily, 'We Walk the Winds' in Man's Oldest form of flight.
texts.text: KBS operates 365 days a year, weather permitting, in the foothills of Mt.  Kilimanjaro  and  the  area  bordering  the  Amboseli  National  Park. With a custom planned and constructed Balloon Safari Camp, we are completely self-sufficient, and your guests are assured of a high-quality first-class experience. From the sunrise to the East, the magnificent Mt. Kilimanjaro to the south, the Amboseli National Park immediately to our north, your guests will see a full array of game including the areas renowned elephants, lions, giraffe, cheetah, zebra, wildebeest, eland, waterbuck, jackals, warthogs, fox and more than 400 species of birds in the immediate area, depending on the day. As Mother Nature dictates where we fly daily, 'We Walk the Winds' in Man's Oldest form of flight.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Every day and every flight is different, but at all times passenger safety, comfort and the guest experience are paramount to us.
texts.text: Every day and every flight is different, but at all times passenger safety, comfort and the guest experience are paramount to us.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Flight Details
texts.text: Flight Details

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At each camp or lodge, we have a pre-determined Meeting Point for pick-up of your pre-booked guests. The time and location will be reconfirmed the afternoon before the flight with the guests or their guide. Meeting time varies depending on the Camp or Lodge and may begin as early as 4:15am as we aim to have all guests at the Balloon Camp prior to 5:30am.
texts.text: At each camp or lodge, we have a pre-determined Meeting Point for pick-up of your pre-booked guests. The time and location will be reconfirmed the afternoon before the flight with the guests or their guide. Meeting time varies depending on the Camp or Lodge and may begin as early as 4:15am as we aim to have all guests at the Balloon Camp prior to 5:30am.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Upon arrival,  passengers  will  visit  and  check-in  at  the  reception  desk  and  complete Passenger Information Waivers. Morning beverages and fresh cookies are available in the Guest Pavilion as well as male and female washrooms, WiFi and USB chargers.
texts.text: Upon arrival,  passengers  will  visit  and  check-in  at  the  reception  desk  and  complete Passenger Information Waivers. Morning beverages and fresh cookies are available in the Guest Pavilion as well as male and female washrooms, WiFi and USB chargers.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A short safety briefing with the Captain of the Balloon precedes the flight on the launch field and Guests will enjoy photo opportunities while the balloon is inflated. In flight, the guests will experience a spectacular 360-degree view of the Amboseli ecosystem, Mt Kilimanjaro, Amboseli National Park, local Maasai Manyattas and plentiful game. Flights generally last about 1-hour, but actual flight time can vary from 45-minutes to 1 ½ hours, depending on the weather conditions of the day. Flight length, direction or game viewed cannot be guaranteed on a given day as we are at the mercy of Mother Nature.
texts.text: A short safety briefing with the Captain of the Balloon precedes the flight on the launch field and Guests will enjoy photo opportunities while the balloon is inflated. In flight, the guests will experience a spectacular 360-degree view of the Amboseli ecosystem, Mt Kilimanjaro, Amboseli National Park, local Maasai Manyattas and plentiful game. Flights generally last about 1-hour, but actual flight time can vary from 45-minutes to 1 ½ hours, depending on the weather conditions of the day. Flight length, direction or game viewed cannot be guaranteed on a given day as we are at the mercy of Mother Nature.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Post-flight, the guests are returned to the Camp to partake in a Champagne Celebration with their Captain and reminisce about their flight. A freshly prepared 'made to order' full hot breakfast is served inclusive of fresh fruits, pastries, cereals, yoghurt, coffee, a selection of teas, hot chocolate and juices. Washrooms, WiFi and USB chargers are available for guest convenience and comfort. Prior to returning guests to their camp, all guests are presented with a Commemorative Flight Ascension Certificate, signed by their Captain, as a memento of their Kilimanjaro Balloon Safari experience.
texts.text: Post-flight, the guests are returned to the Camp to partake in a Champagne Celebration with their Captain and reminisce about their flight. A freshly prepared 'made to order' full hot breakfast is served inclusive of fresh fruits, pastries, cereals, yoghurt, coffee, a selection of teas, hot chocolate and juices. Washrooms, WiFi and USB chargers are available for guest convenience and comfort. Prior to returning guests to their camp, all guests are presented with a Commemorative Flight Ascension Certificate, signed by their Captain, as a memento of their Kilimanjaro Balloon Safari experience.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please submit bookings to bookings@airkbs.com, and include the following:
texts.text: Please submit bookings to bookings@airkbs.com, and include the following:

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: Number and names of guests, specified as Male, Female or Child under 12 and nationality

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: Is pick up required? If so, which camp/lodge?

texts.orig: · Dietary restrictions, if applicable
texts.text: Dietary restrictions, if applicable

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: Reference number for invoicing, if applicable

texts.text: Advise the guests or their driver to contact KBS upon arrival to their Camp/Lodge to confirm pick-up time and any further details.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: What to Wear
texts.text: What to Wear

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Hot Air Ballooning is an interactive experience so it is best to wear clothing that can get dusty or dirty and is suitable for hiking:
texts.text: Hot Air Ballooning is an interactive experience so it is best to wear clothing that can get dusty or dirty and is suitable for hiking:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Some mornings can be quite cool so layering clothing is recommended so it can be removed as the morning warms
texts.text: Some mornings can be quite cool so layering clothing is recommended so it can be removed as the morning warms

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The hot air balloon burners produce radiant heat, so it is recommended to wear a hat. The burners can sometimes drip water mixed with carbon. KBS will not be responsible for clothing damaged or stained
texts.text: The hot air balloon burners produce radiant heat, so it is recommended to wear a hat. The burners can sometimes drip water mixed with carbon. KBS will not be responsible for clothing damaged or stained

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Launch and landing can be in rough terrain. Closed toe shoes are recommended for all guests and high-heeled shoes or open toe shoes are NOT suitable.
texts.text: Launch and landing can be in rough terrain. Closed toe shoes are recommended for all guests and high-heeled shoes or open toe shoes are NOT suitable.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Bring a camera to capture stunning photos of the flight!
texts.text: Bring a camera to capture stunning photos of the flight!

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Flight Inclusions
texts.text: Flight Inclusions

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The full Kilimanjaro Balloon Safari experience will take 4-5 hours from pick-up to return, while the Hot Air Balloon Safari is approximately 1-hour.
texts.text: The full Kilimanjaro Balloon Safari experience will take 4-5 hours from pick-up to return, while the Hot Air Balloon Safari is approximately 1-hour.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Post flight Champagne Celebration and chef prepared 'made to order' hot breakfast
texts.text: Post flight Champagne Celebration and chef prepared 'made to order' hot breakfast

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Complimentary Camp or Lodge pick-up and return with game drives each way
texts.text: Complimentary Camp or Lodge pick-up and return with game drives each way

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Commemorative Flight Ascension Certificate, signed by the Captain.
texts.text: Commemorative Flight Ascension Certificate, signed by the Captain.

texts.orig: Terms & Conditions
texts.text: Terms & Conditions

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · If we cancel your flight, you will be entitled to a full refund.
texts.text: If we cancel your flight, you will be entitled to a full refund.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · If you cancel:
texts.text: If you cancel:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 14+ days prior to flight date - no fees charged.
texts.text: 14+ days prior to flight date - no fees charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 14 - 7 days prior - 50% charged.
texts.text: 14 - 7 days prior - 50% charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 6 days - 48 hours - 75% charged.
texts.text: 6 days - 48 hours - 75% charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Less than 48 hours - 100% charged.
texts.text: Less than 48 hours - 100% charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No show - 100% charged.
texts.text: No show - 100% charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Large Groups of passengers may be subject to different cancellation conditions.
texts.text: Large Groups of passengers may be subject to different cancellation conditions.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Child Rates are between 4 - 11 years of age only. Children under 4 are not permitted.
texts.text: Child Rates are between 4 - 11 years of age only. Children under 4 are not permitted.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Why Choose to Fly With Us?
texts.text: Why Choose to Fly With Us?

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Your guests will be hosted and entertained at the only custom-built Balloon Safari Camp in Kenya.
texts.text: Your guests will be hosted and entertained at the only custom-built Balloon Safari Camp in Kenya.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The Amboseli area provides some of the most balloon-friendly year-round weather in the world.
texts.text: The Amboseli area provides some of the most balloon-friendly year-round weather in the world.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The Amboseli is home to more than 1,800 elephants in the immediate area.
texts.text: The Amboseli is home to more than 1,800 elephants in the immediate area.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · We are in the foothills of Mt. Kilimanjaro and the Amboseli National Park, featuring an unimaginable ecosystem, often referred to as 'paradise'.
texts.text: We are in the foothills of Mt. Kilimanjaro and the Amboseli National Park, featuring an unimaginable ecosystem, often referred to as 'paradise'.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · We rise before the sun, meaning guests will be finished by 9am, allowing the whole day to experience the Amboseli area.
texts.text: We rise before the sun, meaning guests will be finished by 9am, allowing the whole day to experience the Amboseli area.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris is one of the safest, most professional balloon companies in the world. With our related companies, we have been in business since 1985 your guests are in good hands.
texts.text: Kilimanjaro Balloon Safaris is one of the safest, most professional balloon companies in the world. With our related companies, we have been in business since 1985 your guests are in good hands.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Your guests will experience a 5-star Hot Air Balloon Safari adventure with us.
texts.text: Your guests will experience a 5-star Hot Air Balloon Safari adventure with us.
